children.heading: S corporation treated as partnership, etc.
children.label: a S corporation treated as partnership, etc.

children.text: an S corporation shall be treated as a partnership, and
the shareholders of such corporation shall be treated as partners of such partnership.

children.heading: Recapture of overall foreign loss
children.label: b Recapture of overall foreign loss
children.text: For purposes of section 904(f) (relating to recapture of overall foreign loss), the making or termination of an election to be treated as an S corporation shall be treated as a disposition of the business.
